case_title: ANDREA LEUNG VS. RICARDO CAMARENA ROMERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2021 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDREA LEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICARDO CAMARENA ROMERO IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEUNG, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, RICARDO CAMARENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2021 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 13, 2021 AT 6:30 P.M. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; BAILIFF: DILLINGHAM. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
